title: Equipment
description: Equipment: Equipment gains are defined as the amount of both latent and sensible heat contributed by specified equipment within the space (dishwasher, oven, etc)

Sensible.description: The sensible heat contributed by equipment, which contributes to a rise in temperature with no change in phase.

Latent.description: The latent heat contributed by equipment, which contributes to a change in phase from solid to liquid.

RadiantFraction.description: The radiant fraction depicts the percentage of long wave radiant heat given off by equipment.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
